# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "vmNames": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Names of the virtual machines to deploy."
      }
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin username for the virtual machines."
      }
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Admin password for the virtual machines."
      }
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_DS2_v2"
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Windows",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Windows",
        "Linux"
      ]
    },
    "subnetPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.1.0/24"
    },
    "vnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/16"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vnetName": "dev-vnet",
    "subnetName": "dev-subnet",
    "nicNamePrefix": "vmnic",
    "pipNamePrefix": "pip",
    "nsgNamePrefix": "nsg",
    "windowsImagePublisher": "MicrosoftWindowsServer",
    "windowsImageOffer": "WindowsServer",
    "windowsImageSku": "2022-datacenter-azure-edition",
    "linuxImagePublisher": "Canonical",
    "linuxImageOffer": "0001-com-ubuntu-server-focal",
    "linuxImageSku": "20_04-lts-gen2"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[variables('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetPrefix')]"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('nsgNamePrefix'), '-windows')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "condition": "[equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1000,
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('nsgNamePrefix'), '-linux')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "condition": "[equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1000,
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "publicIpCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('vmNames'))]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex('publicIpCopy'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Static",
        "dnsSettings": {
          "domainNameLabel": "[toLower(concat(parameters('vmNames')[copyIndex('publicIpCopy')], '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, copyIndex('publicIpCopy'))))]"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('vmNames'))]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('nicNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex('nicCopy'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex('nicCopy')))]",
        "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(variables('nsgNamePrefix'), '-windows')), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(variables('nsgNamePrefix'), '-linux')))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
              },
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex('nicCopy')))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ],
        "networkSecurityGroup": {
          "id": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(variables('nsgNamePrefix'), '-windows')), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(variables('nsgNamePrefix'), '-linux')))]"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('vmNames'))]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vmNames')[copyIndex('vmCopy')]]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('nicNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex('vmCopy')))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), json(concat('{\"publisher\":\"', variables('windowsImagePublisher'), '\",\"offer\":\"', variables('windowsImageOffer'), '\",\"sku\":\"', variables('windowsImageSku'), '\",\"version\":\"latest\"}')), json(concat('{\"publisher\":\"', variables('linuxImagePublisher'), '\",\"offer\":\"', variables('linuxImageOffer'), '\",\"sku\":\"', variables('linuxImageSku'), '\",\"version\":\"latest\"}')))]",
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
            }
          }
        },
        "osProfile": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), json(concat('{\"computerName\":\"', parameters('vmNames')[copyIndex('vmCopy')], '\",\"adminUsername\":\"', parameters('adminUsername'), '\",\"adminPassword\":\"', parameters('adminPassword'), '\",\"windowsConfiguration\":{\"provisionVMAgent\":true,\"enableAutomaticUpdates\":true}}')), json(concat('{\"computerName\":\"', parameters('vmNames')[copyIndex('vmCopy')], '\",\"adminUsername\":\"', parameters('adminUsername'), '\",\"adminPassword\":\"', parameters('adminPassword'), '\",\"linuxConfiguration\":{\"disablePasswordAuthentication\":false}}')))]",
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('nicNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex('vmCopy')))]",
              "properties": {
                "primary": true
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "publicIpAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "copy": {
        "count": "[length(parameters('vmNames'))]",
        "input": {
          "vmName": "[parameters('vmNames')[copyIndex()]]",
          "publicIpId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex()))]",
          "dnsName": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())), '2023-11-01').dnsSettings.fqdn]",
          "ipAddress": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())), '2023-11-01').ipAddress]"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
